K0510D2 Nutritional Approaches: Post Therapeutic Diet Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident receives a therapeutic diet while a resident of this faciltity within the last seven days. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
^=Blank (skip pattern) effective 4/01/2012
discontinued 9/30/2023
